text.en: Hopfield networks connected neural computation with physics. A pattern could be stored as an attractor in an energy landscape, and a noisy input could settle back into the closest memory. This made associative memory, optimization, and neural dynamics part of the same conceptual frame.
text.zh: Hopfield 网络把神经计算与物理学连接起来。一个模式可以作为能量地形中的吸引子被存储，带噪输入则会收敛回最接近的记忆。它把联想记忆、优化和神经动力学放进同一个概念框架。
